query:
ALTER TABLE menu_items 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS isVegetarian boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS containsGluten boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS containsLactose boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS isSpicy boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS chefRecommended boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false;
